title: Glenn Hughes - Deep Purple Live
description: Glenn Hughes, the legendary Deep Purple bassist and vocalist, performs live in Atlanta! Perfect date night for rock fans - Variety Playhouse has an intimate atmosphere with great sightlines. Full bar inside, restaurants nearby on Euclid Ave. High energy show with classic rock hits.

title: Pours & Punchlines Comedy Showcase
description: Stand-up comedy show right on the Atlanta Beltline! Bring your date for drinks and laughs at this intimate taproom. Great for couples who enjoy comedy and craft beer. Limited capacity - grab tickets early. Food available from rotating food trucks.

title: King Tuff / Fantastic Cat Concert
description: Two excellent indie rock acts in one night at Atlanta's iconic The Earl bar. King Tuff and Fantastic Cat bring psychedelic rock and garage vibes. Budget-friendly concert date - buy drinks at the bar, enjoy the back patio. Easy parking in Little 5 Points.

title: Atlanta miniFEST at Dark Horse Tavern
location: Dark Horse Tavern, 816 N Highland Ave NE, Atlanta
description: Multi-band indie music fest on N Highland - catch several acts for free! Make it a bar crawl date along Highland Avenue. Start early, catch the bands, walk to other bars or grab pizza at Amalfi. Great way to discover new music together.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: Top local comedians in one night at Atlanta's premier comedy dive. 21+ show with full bar. Perfect for couples who love raw, unfiltered comedy. Laughing Skull is intimate - you're close enough to hear every word. Thursday nights are when locals come out.

title: Bachata X Zouk ATL Weekender 2026
location: 5522 New Peachtree Rd STE 103, Chamblee, GA
description: Three days of Bachata and Zouk dancing! Workshops, social dancing, performances. Great for couples who want to learn or improve their dancing together. Weekend pass gives access to all events. Chamblee has great Cuban and Asian food nearby.

title: Vegan Nights ATL: Taste the City
description: Atlanta's ultimate vegan food event! Sample plant-based dishes from multiple vendors, grab drinks, enjoy the vibes. Perfect for foodie couples interested in vegetarian/vegan cuisine. Cash and card accepted. Great photo opportunities with creative food presentations.

title: Art + Salsa Dance Class & Social
location: 3063 Bogie Rd, Buckhead Art Gallery, Atlanta
description: Two-hour event: guided Salsa class followed by social dancing in a Buckhead art gallery setting! Learn basic steps together, then practice on the dance floor. No partner required - they rotate during the lesson. Wine and refreshments available. Unique date night combining culture, movement, and art.

title: Bachata Class + Latin Night at Tortugas
time: Doors 7 PM, class 7:30 PM, dancing after
description: 2-hour Bachata lesson followed by Latin dancing at Atlanta's beloved Cuban institution. Start with the dance lesson (no partner needed), then stay for the party. Tortugas has amazing Cuban food, mojitos, and a lively atmosphere. Budget-friendly date that includes dinner and dancing.

title: Bachata & Zouk Weekend Pass - Day 3
description: Final day of the Bachata X Zouk ATL Weekender! Continue learning or put your new skills to the test on the social dance floor. Great couples activity - learn something new together and meet the dance community. Day passes available if not attending full weekend.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: End-of-month comedy showcase at Atlanta's best comedy dive. Another chance to catch top local talent in an intimate setting. 21+ only, full bar, no food but you're near dozens of Highland Ave restaurants. Perfect late-April date night.

title: To Be Continued - Juan Miguel Palacios Exhibition
description: Solo exhibition featuring vibrant work by Juan Miguel Palacios. Great for couples interested in contemporary art - wander the gallery together, discuss the pieces over coffee afterward. Free admission makes this an easy weekday date option.

title: Celestial Perspectives Textile Exhibition
location: Marietta Cobb Museum of Art, 30 Atlanta Street SE, Marietta
description: Jess Self's installation-based solo exhibition reimagines the museum as a 'cosmic map and textile labyrinth.' Beautiful hand-woven pieces create an immersive experience. Make a day of it - see the exhibit, then explore historic Marietta Square for dinner.

title: Brittany Adeline King: Dokafleh
description: Contemporary art exhibition at Atlanta Contemporary - free admission, always. Great for couples who want to support local arts without spending money. The exhibition runs through mid-May so plenty of time to catch it. Located in the West Midtown arts district.
